1.12.1.1.2: More compatibility with mods, bugs fixed
1.12.1.1.3: Added NBT tags to config, updated UI, bugs fixed
1.12.2.0.0: New generator's features: Generation setting. You can disable fluid, mobs or chests generation; New JSON editor for blocksets config; Support for the metas array; Support for additional conditions for unlocking sets; Ownership and membership; Claiming free generator; Generation cooldown when block generating from non player. Bugs fixed, UI improved, foolproof, save of "One Block" world has mod's logo
1.12.2.1.0: Sets constructor; added "One Block Generator" recipe and achievement; added new command to set generator's owner; now you can disable saplings generation; bugs fixed; UI improvements; updated sets config
1.12.2.1.1: The ability to edit unlock conditions has been added to the sets constructor;the obtained items do not drop out, but are teleported to the player's inventory;the meta value is now taken into account in the view for adding blocks;added update checker;fixed bugs
